data.title: Capital City Bank Group (NASDAQ: CCBG) to release quarterly earnings on 2026-01-27. Analysts predict EPS of $0.89. Market awaits strong guidance.
data.description: Capital City Bank Group (NASDAQ: CCBG) is set to reveal its quarterly earnings on January 27, 2026. Analysts predict an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.89 for the company. Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement, with hopes of surpassing estimates and receiving positive guidance for the upcoming quarter. It's crucial for new investors to recognize that while earnings performance is significant, market reactions are frequently influenced by guidance. In the past, the company has beaten its EPS expectations. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: National Bank Holdings (NYSE: NBHC) to report quarterly earnings on 2026-01-27 with estimated EPS of $0.84. Bulls seek positive guidance.
data.description: National Bank Holdings (NYSE: NBHC) will release its quarterly earnings report on Tuesday, January 27, 2026. Analysts predict the company will report an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.84. Investors are eager to see if National Bank Holdings surpasses this estimate and offers optimistic guidance for the upcoming quarter. It is worth noting that stock price movements are not solely determined by beating or missing earnings estimates. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: PR Newswire introduces enhanced Brand Voice features for precise content control in the Amplify platform.
data.description: PR Newswire has announced the launch of improved Brand Voice features on its PR Newswire Amplify™ platform. These enhancements offer customers heightened control over content creation, enabling a more precise application of their brand voice. This update aims to provide users with a more customizable experience and improve brand representation on the platform.

data.title: Dental Intelligence appoints Scott Johnson as CEO, bringing over a decade of experience to enhance customer-focused approach.
data.description: In Pleasant Grove, Utah, a prominent dental industry solutions provider, Dental Intelligence, has revealed the appointment of Scott Johnson as the new Chief Executive Officer. With a background of over ten years in growing vertical and infrastructure software ventures, Johnson is expected to bolster Dental Intelligence's customer-centric strategies and strengthen its industry standing. He takes over from former CEO Dan Geraty, aiming to lead the company to greater success and prominence in the dental sector.

data.title: Sandbox VR opens new venue in Treviso, Italy, aiming to open 40 new venues worldwide with partners Vito Scavo and Alessandro Bergamo.
data.description: A collaboration between entrepreneurs Vito Scavo, Alessandro Bergamo, and their company Immexia Srl is kicking off an expansion project with the opening of the first out of the planned 40 new venues in Treviso, Italy. The venture, involving Sandbox VR, marks a significant development in the entertainment industry.

data.title: Michael Iskra named CEO of Cleveland Diagnostics after FDA approval of IsoPSA assay, aiming for strategic growth.
data.description: In Cleveland, Michael Iskra has been named the CEO of Cleveland Diagnostics with the aim of propelling strategic growth after the FDA greenlighted its IsoPSA Assay. Iskra is set to lead the company towards rapid expansion in their endeavors.

data.title: Price predictions as of 1/26: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, ADA, BCH.Traders defend support levels amid high volatility and declining sentiment, hindering market recovery.
data.description: Market participants are steadfastly protecting the lowest support levels for both Bitcoin and altcoins. However, obstacles are arising from sellers at the range highs and a general downturn in market sentiment. These factors could hinder a swift rebound in the market.

data.title: Acumatica partners with AvidXchange for payment automation, creating integrated payment solution.
data.description: Acumatica has chosen AvidXchange to enhance payment automation. The partnership aims to create an integrated payments system in Acumatica to simplify the payment process. This collaboration will significantly improve efficiency in managing financial transactions.

data.title: Stockarkalytics introduces AI-based investment analysis platform emphasizing data-driven insights, revolutionizing stock analysis.
data.description: Transforming the way stock analysis is conducted, cutting-edge data-driven insights and AI technology are being utilized, marking a significant shift in the industry. By leveraging advanced technologies, including artificial intelligence, the process of analyzing stocks is undergoing a dramatic evolution. This groundbreaking approach is set to revolutionize the sector, providing investors with unparalleled opportunities for informed decision-making. In the fast-paced world of finance, the integration of data-driven insights and AI technology is proving immensely beneficial, with a projected increase in accuracy rates of up to 20% and a corresponding reduction in analysis time by as much as 30%. These advancements are reshaping the landscape of stock analysis, empowering market participants with superior tools and information to navigate the complexities of the market effectively.

data.title: Increased power outages possible as freezing temps continue. Grids fared well during storm, but experts warn of ongoing risk.
data.description: Despite the storm over the weekend, electrical grids managed to hold up well. However, energy analysts warned that there is still a likelihood of further power outages.

data.title: Lockheed Martin, PG&E, Salesforce, and Wells Fargo launch EMBERPOINT™ to improve wildfire prevention, detection, and response in the US. (Numbers: Companies involved - 4)
data.description: Today, major companies Lockheed Martin (LMT), PG&E Corporation (PCG), Salesforce (CRM), and Wells Fargo (WFC) introduced a new endeavor - EMBERPOINTTMLLC. This specialized venture aims to incorporate advanced wildfire solutions to assist in firefighting efforts.

data.title: Franco-Nevada secures $100M financing with Orezone Gold for Casa Berardi Mine.
data.description: TORONTO, 26 January 2026 - Franco-Nevada Corporation, listed on the TSX as FNV and NYSE as FNV, has disclosed the initiation of a $100 million gold stream deal through a Canadian subsidiary.

data.title: DMS at NADA to discuss automotive commerce future after joining Priority in 2025, booth 6112N, focus on payments and margins.
data.description: Dealer Merchant Services (DMS) will be showcasing at the National Automobile Dealers Association (NADA) Show from Feb. 3–6 in Las Vegas, their first display at the esteemed event since affiliating with Priority’s commerce platform in 2025. Debuting at booth 6112N, the DMS representatives aim to engage with dealers and industry associates, presenting insights on the forthcoming trends in automotive commerce. They will delve into areas such as payment methods, cost recuperation, and financial transactions within dealerships that impact profit margins.

data.title: Superior Group of Companies introduces Shareholder Rewards Program with Stockperks, connecting investors with companies.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, in St. Petersburg, Florida, Superior Group of Companies, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGC) revealed the initiation of a new shareholder rewards program in collaboration with Stockperks. The program is aimed at enhancing engagement with their investors and is facilitated by Stockperks, a platform connecting retail investors with the corporations they are invested in. Superior Group of Companies, a prominent manufacturer and distributor of uniforms, branded items, and call center services, is looking to strengthen its bond with shareholders through this initiative.

data.title: Telesat and Hanwha partner on next-gen space tech. MoU signed for satellite connectivity solutions. #satellite #space
data.description: In Ottawa, Ontario on January 26, 2026, Telesat (listed on Nasdaq and TSX as TSAT) and Hanwha Systems Co, Ltd revealed a partnership through the signing of a memorandum of understanding. Telesat, one of the largest satellite operators globally, joined forces with the prominent Korean corporation of the Hanwha Group. The collaboration aims to work together on advanced satellite connectivity solutions and user terminals aligned with Telesat's Low Earth Orbit network, Telesat Lightspeed, marking a significant step in the evolution of satellite technology.

data.title: Dr. Ginger Henson of AestheticEye named 2026 Castle Connolly Top Doctor for expertise in blepharoplasty.
data.description: Renowned oculoplastic surgeon Dr. Ginger Henson from AestheticEye has recently been recognized as a 2026 Castle Connolly Top Doctor. This distinguished accolade is bestowed upon exceptional physicians across the country. Dr. Henson's specialization in blepharoplasty and overall skills have been highlighted through this national honor.

data.title: Hermeus appoints Zachary Shore as President and Steve Furger as CTO to drive high-speed aircraft development.
data.description: Atlanta-based company Hermeus has revealed today the new appointments of Zachary Shore as President and Steve Furger as Chief as the company expands to accommodate its largest product roadmap yet. The high-speed aircraft company is aiming to meet growing demands with these strategic moves.
